attributes.additional_details:
Keir Starmer has lost the confidence of the house and the people. 
The mandate that was set was people before party, that is no longer the case.
It’s been lie after lie, scandal after scandal and the British people deserve more.
First it was farmers, then pensioners, working people and the endless stream of illegal boats. 
Not to mention the lack of security and support for women and girls. 

As a nation We no longer have confidence in this government
attributes.background:
Call a general election as the people have lost confidence in this government.
We must listen to the people via this petition and we no longer support Keir Starmer to lead the nation.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
